welcome_text: We accompany your business at all stages of foreign economic activitys
logistic_text: Guaranteed delivery of your cargo: from point A to point B — accurately, safely, and transparently. We take full responsibility for meeting deadlines and ensuring the safety of each shipment. Thanks to our well-established processes and constant monitoring, you always know where your cargo is. By trusting us, you get more than just transportation — you get confidence in the outcome.
expertise_text: in the most demanding transportation. Our experience allows us to flawlessly carry out projects of any complexity: from urgent shipments to transportation of hazardous, temperature and oversized cargo. We have in-depth knowledge of international logistics in key countries and regions. Using our own resources and a network of partners, we provide reliable delivery in Russia and in cross-border traffic. Our flexibility and readiness for non-standard tasks are your key to solving the most difficult logistics challenges.
priority_text: Your global logistics is our forte from day one. We built this company with a clear goal: to become a reliable partner for businesses that need seamless international transportation. To achieve this, we didn't just assemble a team; we carefully selected individuals with not just extensive but truly valuable, sometimes unique, expertise in overcoming logistical challenges worldwide. By combining their knowledge of maritime, aviation, road, and rail transportation, we have a powerful resource at our disposal to meet your needs. This synergistic experience allows us to find optimal, and often unconventional, solutions for even the most complex requests, saving you time and budget. We are young enough to think outside the box, and experienced enough to act with confidence.
global_presence_text: The global network is your key to simple and secure international logistics. Understanding the complexities of cross-border operations, we have built our own infrastructure: a subsidiary company in Kazakhstan and a representative office in Manchuria (China) ensure not only flawless transportation organization, but also full support of financial flows. Our local teams guarantee the legality of transactions and promptly resolve issues with contract payments, minimizing your currency and banking risks. This is a comprehensive turnkey solution for your business in the EAEU and Asia. With the opening of our office in Alashankou (China), our presence will expand, allowing us to manage cargo flows along the New Silk Road even more effectively. Trust the experts on the ground
partnership_text: We don't just transport cargo; we create customized logistics solutions that take into account all the details, such as the specific nature of your product, budget constraints, and tight deadlines. Our team of experts thoroughly analyzes your request to propose the most efficient route and mode of transportation (road, rail, air, sea, or multimodal transportation). We handle all the complexities, from organizing door-to-door deliveries to assisting with paperwork. Our primary goal is to ensure the smooth operation of your business processes while saving you time and resources.
adress: 214530, Smolensk Oblast, Pechersk village, Smolenskaya st., 20, office 1
footer_address: 214530, Smolensk Oblast, Pechersk village, Smolenskaya st., 20, office 1
auto_delivery_text: Russia and abroad: speed, flexibility, door-to-door. The optimal solution for urgent and regular deliveries of any volume, from batch shipments (LTL) to full trucks (FTL). Our own fleet and a wide network of trusted carriers ensure reliable door-to-door delivery, even to remote regions. We create routes tailored to your deadlines, cargo requirements, and budget, providing full control along the way.
rail_delivery_text: We are the key link in your international supply chain. We organize efficient container transportation by rail, both within Russia and as part of multimodal routes (sea-rail, road-rail). We optimize transit times and costs, especially on transcontinental routes (Europe-Asia). We manage the entire process, from ordering a platform car to removing the container from the destination station.
sea_delivery_text: We are the key link in your international supply chain. We organize efficient container transportation by rail, both within Russia and as part of multimodal routes (sea-rail, road-rail). We optimize transit times and costs, especially on transcontinental routes (Europe-Asia). We manage the entire process, from ordering a platform car to removing the container from the destination station.
air_delivery_text: Your cargo to any airport in the world. Our extensive network of partners, including leading airlines and ground operators, allows us to deliver your cargo to almost any part of the world quickly and efficiently. We offer urgent transportation of general cargo, valuables, documents, and consumer goods (CG) on regular and charter flights. We minimize transit time, provide priority processing at airports, and ensure that your deadlines are met. Your urgency is our top priority.
request_sent: Your request has been sent! We will contact you shortly.

case1_text: Project transportation of a batch of bulldozers from Qingzhou to the Moscow Region and the Krasnodar Territory.
case2_text: Transportation of a batch of bulldozers from Suifenhe to the Khabarovsk Territory. Carried out in the format of two units on one platform.
case3_text: Transportation of power equipment weighing 85 tons from St. Petersburg to Novosibirsk.

sla_intro_text:
In an era of global change and rapid growth in logistics, keeping pace is not enough — you need to stay ahead of the market. At {company_name}, we build our work on full transparency, technology, and mutual respect with partners. Our goal is not only to deliver cargo, but to make transportation predictable, fast, and legally sound for every party.

For us, a standard is not just a set of obligations, but a tool for achieving results. We use digital tools that speed up document flow and eliminate delays at the approval stage. Our philosophy is simple: predictability builds trust, and trust is the foundation of long-term partnership.
sla_customers_text:
We aim for results in every shipment, understanding that behind each load are your business interests. We take full responsibility for the process: from carrier verification to monitoring cargo movement along the route.

Key standards of working with us:

  • Decision speed: we confirm requests and assign transport within 2 hours of receiving the order.
  • Legal clarity: we bear full responsibility for organizing transportation (Art. 805 of the Civil Code of the Russian Federation) and insure every trip.
  • Transparent pricing: the service cost is agreed before transport is dispatched and contains no hidden fine print.

Electronic document flow

To speed up and optimize paperwork, we use a public offer agreement — a standard practice in logistics. The agreement published on our website removes the need to exchange paper copies for every deal. By submitting a request or paying an invoice, you automatically accept the terms of cooperation, allowing us to start transportation quickly without losing legal validity.
sla_carriers_text:
We build long-term relationships with carriers on honesty and predictable workload. We value your time and resources, so our cooperation follows clear rules that protect both sides.

What we expect from a partner:

  • Punctuality: adherence to pickup and delivery schedules.
  • Cargo safety: responsibility for the cargo from acceptance for carriage.
  • Status: a valid liability insurance policy; additional cargo insurance is a plus.

What we offer in return:

  • Stable payment: competitive rates and payment after trip completion within agreed terms.
  • Transparent downtime: guaranteed payment for excess downtime at a fixed rate.
  • Digital document flow: cooperation under a public offer. All essential terms are recorded in one table — the Order, which is legally binding upon acceptance. This speeds up approval and eliminates the risk of losing paper documents.
